## Checklist

- [ ] I included no secret, private key, embargoed vulnerability, or private cryptographic material.
- [ ] I included no opaque or unreviewable binary.
- [ ] This change does not silently decide a Gate 0 question.
- [ ] Coupled documents, schemas, threat records, and the decision register are updated.
- [ ] This pull request does not publicly disclose a privately reported vulnerability.
- [ ] The author did not self-approve assurance-critical work.
